---
name: Blunt Win
about: Track a coarse learning milestone for SGCL. Each blunt win produces a working capability, a documented constraint, or a killed assumption.
title: "[blunt-win] <name>"
labels: ["blunt-win"]
---

## Goal

What this win produces if it succeeds. One or two sentences.

## Learning question

The single question this win answers.

## Scope

What is in. Keep it small.

- ...

## Out of scope

What is explicitly not in this win.

- ...

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...
- [ ] Spike note exists at `spikes/<name>.md` and is filled in.

## Dependencies

Other blunt wins or decisions this depends on.

- ...

## Main risk

The thing most likely to make this win fail or mislead us.

- ...

## Expected outputs

Pick at least one. (If none, this is not a blunt win.)

- [ ] A working capability
- [ ] A documented constraint
- [ ] A killed assumption
